title: Job Openings at Adexen Recruitment Agency
content:
Adexen is a global Human Ressources Company providing business and support services in Africa. We support companies in all industries in the fields of HR, Legal, Finance, Sales & Marketing, Engineering and Supply chain.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Senior Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Industry: Energy / Oil & Gas
Job Seniority: Manager
Job Category: Accounting and Finance
Reporting to: The Finance Manager
Employment Type: Full time

Job Introduction
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Adexen has been entrusted by a leading international provider of multidisciplinary technical and engineering services in the Oil & Gas industry to recruit a Senior Accountant.
	This role is based in Lagos.


Responsibilities


	The Senior Accountant will be responsible for ensuring the accuracy, integrity, and compliance of financial data, while supporting the business with reliable financial insights. 
	Maintain and reconcile general ledger accounts and ensure the accuracy of financial records.
	Review progress documentation and prepare customer invoices.
	Ensure timely transmission of invoices and proper filing of supporting documentation.
	Monitor accounts receivable and ensure prompt collections.
	Compute and post provisions, including NCD provisions.
	Perform account reconciliations and clearing in SAP.
	Review forex adjustments and revaluation entries.
	Maintain and update the chart of accounts.
	Ensure proper accounting filing and documentation systems.
	Implement and monitor internal controls over accounting transactions.
	Book intercompany loans and debit notes in SAP in line with transfer agreements.
	Support financial and tax audits and coordinate with internal and external auditors.
	Ensure compliance with statutory, tax, and regulatory requirements.
	Identify opportunities to optimize tax efficiency.
	Monitor and support financial knowledge management within the organization.
	Participate actively in HSE and quality management initiatives.
	Identify risks and hazards related to accounting and administrative activities.
	Ensure compliance with company HSE policies and regulatory requirements.
	Promote a culture of safety, quality, and continuous improvement.


Desired Skills and Experience
Education & Certifications:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business Administration.
	ACCA or equivalent professional certification preferred.
	Strong technical knowledge in tax matters.


Experience:


	Minimum of 5 years of experience in accounting roles within a large company or international environment.
	Experience handling tax-related matters.
	Prior experience in the Oil & Gas sector or in an industrial services environment is a strong advantage.
	Strong knowledge of SAP and financial reporting processes.


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Attention to detail and high level of accuracy.
	Solid understanding of accounting standards and financial controls.
	Good presentation and communication skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel.
	Ability to work cross-functionally and manage multiple priorities.
	Strong interpersonal and stakeholder management skills.
	Continuous learning mindset and professional development orientation.


Salary
N30,000 / month. 

Click here to apply online

Note: We thank all applicants, however, only those selected will be contacted.

 

 

2.) Sales / Marketing Executive

Job Location: Lagos
Industry: Industry & Manufacturing
Job Seniority: Manager
Job Category: Business Development
Employment Type: Full time

Responsibilities


	Develop and execute comprehensive sales and marketing plans to meet revenue targets.
	Identify new business opportunities and generate leads through various channels.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing and potential clients.
	Conduct market research to identify trends, competitor analysis, and customer needs.
	Monitor and analyze sales performance, providing regular reports and insights to management.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure alignment and maximize results.
	Build relationships with contractors, engineers, site owners, architects, etc.
	Get information about all construction sites within assigned territory and make regular visits to build relationships.
	Attend industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote the company.


Desired Skills and Experience


	HND / Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, or a related field.
	2-5 years of proven experience in sales and marketing
	Background in B2B marketing, construction, building materials, equipment, or related industries is a strong advantage
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.
	Creative thinker with a passion for innovation and problem-solving.
	Results-oriented with a track record of achieving sales targets.


Click here to apply online

Note: We thank all applicants however only those selected will be contacted.

 

 

3.) Financial Controller

Job Location: Lagos
Industry: Industry & Manufacturing
Job Seniority: Manager
Job Category: Accounting and Finance
Employment Type: Full time

Responsibilities


	Oversee day-to-day financial operations, accounting records, and reporting
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements
	Ensure proper accounting controls across all departments
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and budget performance
	Oversee accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger functions
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations, statutory filings, and regulatory requirements
	Coordinate audits and liaise with external auditors, tax consultants, and regulators
	Review payroll processing and statutory deductions
	Support management with financial analysis, forecasting, and decision-making
	Implement and improve financial policies, procedures, and internal controls
	Supervise and review the work of the accounts team


Desired Skills and Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 8 year of experience in accounting or finance, preferably in a trading or FMCG environment
	A Professional qualification (ICAN or ACCA) is required
	Strong knowledge of accounting standards, financial reporting, and tax compliance
	Experience working with inventory, cost control, and warehouse-related accounting
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills
	High level of integrity, professionalism, and confidentiality
	Ability to work independently and manage deadlines effectively.


Click here to apply online

Note: We thank all applicants however only those selected will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Apapa, Lagos

About the Job


	They are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Administrative Officer to oversee and coordinate daily administrative and office operations.
	The role involves managing day-to-day office activities, maintaining accurate records and documentation, coordinating internal communications, and supporting reporting and compliance processes.


Responsibilities


	Coordinate daily office and administrative operations
	Manage shipment documentation and operational records
	Maintain organized filing systems (physical and electronic)
	Support communication between logistics, warehouse, and management teams
	Handle correspondence, emails, and phone inquiries
	Prepare routine reports and operational summaries
	Schedule meetings and manage office calendars
	Ensure compliance with company policies and logistics procedures
	Provide general administrative support to ensure smooth operations.


Qualifications


	B.Sc. / HND in Admin or a related discipline.
	1&ndash;2 years of relevant Logistic experience
	Good knowledge of Microsoft suits (Words, Excel, PowerPoint).


Behavioral &amp; Soft Skills:


	High level of attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.


Salary

Administrative Officer Job at Lopterra Services Limited




        
    

        
        Lopterra Services Limited - Our client is a leading freight forwarder based in Lagos Nigeria, specializing in comprehensive logistics solutions that encompasses air, sea, and land transportation. With a strong network of global partners and a dedicated team of industry experts. They provide seamless and efficient services tailored to meet the diverse needs of their client across international freight forwarding (Air, Sea & Land), customs brokerage and clearing, bonded and free zone warehousing, NVOCC representation, courier and express delivery, importer of record (IOR) services, project cargo and heavy-duty transport.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Apapa, Lagos

About the Job


	They are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Administrative Officer to oversee and coordinate daily administrative and office operations.
	The role involves managing day-to-day office activities, maintaining accurate records and documentation, coordinating internal communications, and supporting reporting and compliance processes.


Responsibilities


	Coordinate daily office and administrative operations
	Manage shipment documentation and operational records
	Maintain organized filing systems (physical and electronic)
	Support communication between logistics, warehouse, and management teams
	Handle correspondence, emails, and phone inquiries
	Prepare routine reports and operational summaries
	Schedule meetings and manage office calendars
	Ensure compliance with company policies and logistics procedures
	Provide general administrative support to ensure smooth operations.


Qualifications


	B.Sc. / HND in Admin or a related discipline.
	1–2 years of relevant Logistic experience
	Good knowledge of Microsoft suits (Words, Excel, PowerPoint).


Behavioral & Soft Skills:


	High level of attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 / month.    

    

        Click here to Apply
